title: Achaemenid navy
body: The Achaemenid navy (Old Persian: 𐎴𐎠𐎺 nāva) was the principal naval force of the Achaemenid Empire which existed between 525 BC and 330 BC.
categories: Articles containing Old Persian (ca. 600-400 B.C.)-language text
Articles with unsourced statements from September 2022
Military history of the Indian Ocean
Military units and formations of the Achaemenid Empire
